summary: Comprehensive testing of PasseportEtudiant new features (iteration 2). All 19 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed covering: Admin page (login, dashboard, delete protection), Analytics page (Overview/Leads tabs, filters, CSV export), Teacher page (leaderboard with 'toi' marker), Recap page (leaderboard, badge preview, share/download buttons). Fixed backend bug: PROF2026B was not protected from deletion.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: PROF2026B was not protected from deletion in backend - now both demo classes are protected
Fixed: admin_reset now keeps all demo students' stamps (not just Lucas and Théo)
All new endpoints properly exclude MongoDB _id from responses
CSV export correctly sets Content-Disposition attachment header
Leaderboard correctly ranks classes by avg stamps per student
seed_data_creation: Backend seeds 8 demo students with pre-seeded stamps: Lucas (5), Emma (4), Nadia (3), Hugo (2) in PROF2026; Sarah (7), Malik (5), Léa (1) in PROF2026B; Théo (anonymous, 0)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 new features working correctly: (1) Shareable PNG badge on recap - download/share buttons work, (2) Qualified leads dashboard with filters + CSV export - all filters work, (3) Enriched seed + admin page - login with 'letudiant2026', demo protection works, (4) Class leaderboard - shows on teacher page and recap page with 'toi' marker. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_new_features.py cover all new endpoints.

backend_new_endpoints: GET /api/leaderboard - returns classes ranked by avg stamps with {code, school_name, teacher_name, students, stamps, avg, rank}
GET /api/analytics/leads - returns filtered lead list with score, stamp_count, consents, filieres
GET /api/analytics/leads?consent=d - returns only students with Diplomeo consent
GET /api/analytics/leads.csv - returns CSV with Content-Disposition attachment header
GET /api/admin/all-students - returns all students (including demo) with stamp_count
GET /api/admin/all-classes - returns all classes with student_count
frontend_new_features: SelectPage footer: '🔐 Admin' button navigates to /admin
AdminPage: login form with key validation (letudiant2026)
AdminPage: invalid key shows error message
AdminPage: dashboard shows stats KPIs, Actualiser/Reset buttons
AdminPage: students table with search + includeDemo checkbox
AdminPage: demo students have disabled delete button
AdminPage: classes table with delete protection for PROF2026/PROF2026B
AnalyticsPage Leads tab: filters work (filiere, consent, min_stamps)
AnalyticsPage Leads tab: 'Exporter CSV' button with correct href
TeacherPage: '🏆 Classement des classes' card with ranked list
TeacherPage: leaderboard highlights own class with 'toi' marker
RecapPage: badge preview card with score
enriched_seed: Lucas, Théo, Emma, Nadia, Hugo in PROF2026 (Henri-IV)
All demo students have pre-seeded stamps

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: PROF2026B was not protected from deletion
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Added PROF2026B to protected classes list in delete_class endpoint

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: admin_reset only kept stamps for Lucas and Théo
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Updated to keep stamps for all 8 demo students
